title: The Reach Where the Lesson Flows

features.name: stone-steps
features.desc-on-touch: you feel the ancient stones under your feet, each one placed where water and patience met. they run in rows like a sermon in granite.

features.name: teaching-channel
features.desc-on-touch: the water speaks in one direction here, and the land learns by repetition. this is how patience teaches: by showing the same lesson endlessly.

features.name: fence-line-archive
features.desc-on-touch: notches carved into posts, marking time and water-height. the archive learned to count by watching this fence record the year.

features.name: grain-measure
features.desc-on-touch: a wooden measure rests here, counting the dry season by how much it empties. patience and measure are not opposites.

features.name: flow-marker
features.desc-on-touch: you read the current marking what it has learned from stone. the lesson writes itself as a scar on water.

inscription: the lesson flows now, teaching faster than stone can grow, but patience remembers it was always this way

file.name: WaterHeight_Notches_1952-1988.txt
file.note: handwritten record of water marks against fence posts. the archive discovered patience by reading how slowly the pattern repeats.

exits.label: back upstream to where patience is still learning
the paddock continues east where the lesson becomes rumour
exits.to: NEW: where the fences forget their teaching

exits.label: west into thicker country, where flow becomes resistance
south where the lesson joins the river and learns to roar
exits.to: NEW: the junction where patience becomes current
